goal: Merge selected remote branches into main, validate with required checks, and produce commit.
constraints: Follow AGENTS.md guardrails including tool and directory restrictions
Operate offline; avoid network-dependent commands beyond existing refs
Use pnpm scripts for setup, linting, tests, and smoke checks
Preserve git history; do not rewrite existing commits
Ensure merge maintains episodes/reports directories as required

acceptance.then: main contains the selected remote branch commits without unresolved conflicts

acceptance.when: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke run

acceptance.then: working tree is clean with recorded merge commit

input.task: Inspect git status and remote branches to confirm merge targets

steps.expect: Selected branch list and recorded divergence notes
Merge applied in working tree or conflicts surfaced for resolution

input.command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke
git commit -m 'merge: integrate remote updates into main'

risks: Existing local commit diverges causing complex history
Tests or smoke check failing post-merge
Long-running pnpm smoke command increasing cycle time
rollback: Use git merge --abort if conflicts cannot be resolved
Reset to previous HEAD via git reset --hard HEAD^ if merge commit committed inadvertently
Re-run pnpm setup if dependencies drift
Restore plan.json from git if plan adjustments incorrect
